rulings.Case Title: ENRIQUE PEDROZA et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complt
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 27, 2012. Line 1 - PLAINTIFF ENRIQUE PEDROZA and LAILA PORTUGAL's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint. Off calendar, first amended complaint filed per stipulation. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KABITA CHOUDHURI VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For A Preliminary Injunction On All Proceedings, Sales And Other Predatory Actions By Defts, Their Employees And Agents Until Final Determination
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 27, 2012. Line 2 - PLAINTIFF KABITA CHOUDHURI's Motion For A Preliminary Injunction On All Proceedings, Sales And Other Predatory Actions By Defendants, Their Employees And Agents Until Final Determination. Deny, 1. Res Judicata. 2. Moving party failed to show any possibility of prevailing on merits. Defendant's request for judicial notice is denied - unbound and untabbed 300 page submission not acceptable.=(501/REQ)
